creator: mkamm@gmx.net
text:
lack of time and not using the port any more

--- /usr/ports/devel/libreadline-java/Makefile.orig     2014-07-23 15:24:53.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/ports/devel/libreadline-java/Makefile  2014-08-15 10:38:44.000000000 +0200
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 CATEGORIES=            devel java
 MASTER_SITES=          SF/java-readline/java-readline/${PORTVERSION}

-MAINTAINER=    mkamm@gmx.net
+MAINTAINER=    ports at FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=       JNI wrapper around GNU Readline / libedit / libgetline

 BUILD_DEPENDS= ${LOCALBASE}/include/editline/readline.h:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libedit
